## CSS Custom Properties

| Name                   | Description                                                    |
| ---------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `--mds-tab-background` | Sets the background-color of the component                     |
| `--mds-tab-radius`     | Sets the border-radius of the button when the mouse is over it |
